languages.text: {n}Сенешаль отдает приказ по {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксу{/g}: взять Изимонда под стражу и направить к нему дознавателей. Ее тон не терпит возражений.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Стартует этюд DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead и DL_JuvennaSuspicionGaprak, комплитим Obj4_DeadEnd

traits.locale_text: {n}Сенешаль отдает приказ по {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксу{/g}: взять Изимонда под стражу и направить к нему дознавателей. Ее тон не терпит возражений.{/n}

languages.translation_comment: Стартует этюд DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead и DL_JuvennaSuspicionGaprak, комплитим Obj4_DeadEnd

languages.text: {n}The Seneschal issues the order over the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}: to take Sauerback into custody and send interrogators to him. Her tone brooks no argument.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Сенешаль отдает приказ по {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксу{/g}: взять Изимонда под стражу и направить к нему дознавателей. Ее тон не терпит возражений.{/n}

languages.text: {n}总领用不容置疑的语气通过{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}下令：逮捕苏尔贝克，再派审讯官前去审问。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal issues the order over the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}: to take Sauerback into custody and send interrogators to him. Her tone brooks no argument.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La sénéchale donne ses ordres sur le canal {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} : placer Sauerback en détention et lui envoyer des interrogateurs. Le ton sur lequel elle s'exprime ne laisse pas de place à la discussion.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal issues the order over the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}: to take Sauerback into custody and send interrogators to him. Her tone brooks no argument.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La sénéchale donne ses ordres sur le canal {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} : placer Sauerback en détention et lui envoyer des interrogateurs. Le ton sur lequel elle s'exprime ne laisse pas de place à la discussion.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seneşal, {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voks{/g} aracılığıyla emri veriyor. Sauerback'in gözaltına alınmasını ve sorgucuların Sauerback'in yanına gönderilmesini söylüyor. Sesinin tınısı, hiçbir itiraza mahal vermiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal issues the order over the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}: to take Sauerback into custody and send interrogators to him. Her tone brooks no argument.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seneşal, {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voks{/g} aracılığıyla emri veriyor. Sauerback'in gözaltına alınmasını ve sorgucuların Sauerback'in yanına gönderilmesini söylüyor. Sesinin tınısı, hiçbir itiraza mahal vermiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La Senescal da la orden por {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g}: arrestar a Sauerback y enviarle interrogadores. Su tono no admite respuesta alguna.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal issues the order over the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}: to take Sauerback into custody and send interrogators to him. Her tone brooks no argument.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La Senescal da la orden por {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g}: arrestar a Sauerback y enviarle interrogadores. Su tono no admite respuesta alguna.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Truchsessin erteilt den Befehl per {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g}: Sauerback soll verhaftet und verhört werden. Ihr Ton lässt keinen Widerspruch zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal issues the order over the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}: to take Sauerback into custody and send interrogators to him. Her tone brooks no argument.{/n}

languages.text: {n}執事長は{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}ヴォックス{/g}を通して、ザウアーバックを拘束し、尋問官を派遣するよう命じた。彼女の命令は容赦なく、反論の余地はない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Seneschal issues the order over the {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}: to take Sauerback into custody and send interrogators to him. Her tone brooks no argument.{/n}
